findings.issue: Audit enabled but retention and export not configured
findings.recommended_fix: Set appropriate retention_days and configure export_sink for audit logs in prod.yaml.

findings.issue: Development credentials and debug settings present in config file
findings.evidence_span: dev.yaml: dev.api_token and dev.debug are present under a dev-only profile.
findings.recommended_fix: Ensure dev.yaml is excluded from production deployments, or use separate config management to prevent dev-only settings from leaking into production.
